name: session_start
description: Session startup workflow. Read state → diff DB → flag questions → report ready.

nodes.description: LAZY: Do NOT preload active_rules_summary.md at startup. Instead use kb_index.py related/impacts on demand during work. This saves ~22KB (~7K tokens) per session.
If project has backlog.db (project_management type), run backlog.py summary and remind to show open P0/P1, blocked, and stale items. Skipped for knowledge-type projects.
Run kb_index.py validate to detect expired TTL, supersede inconsistencies, and semantic conflicts. Report any WARN/ERROR to user.
Check DB for changes since last session (new tables, row counts)
Identify and flag open questions from project_state.md
Report session ready status to user with context summary
